microsoft_ft: Operated as a **founding PM** for Azure's resilience validation charter, scaling a 2-person effort into a platformized system sustaining **45+ annual drills** and driving **$14M+ business impact** across strategic enterprise customers (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp).

Led **0→1 product creation** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining requirements, architecture, and self-service scheduling that cut operational toil by **30%** and shifted execution to a repeatable, scalable model adopted org-wide.

Pioneered Azure's first **proactive resilience testing** capability by shipping a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous validation surface across the fleet.

Acted as **trusted advisor to C-suite and VP stakeholders**, directing 14 cross-org recovery executions including bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract** with executive visibility.

Shipped an internal **AI agent** for drill planning using LLM-powered workflows and prompt engineering, restructuring planning ceremonies to cut cycle time by **39%** and grow drill capacity by **21%** without added headcount.

Led deep discovery with partner engineering teams to diagnose structurally broken recovery workflows, forming product hypotheses and pressure-testing them with executives before scoping builds — turning ambiguous customer pain into shipped product surfaces.
microsoft_2023: Drove enterprise **adoption of AI-powered code generation** across 14 Azure service teams via hands-on demos, training, and embedded enablement, saving **37 engineering hours/month** and proving the ROI case for broader rollout.

Shaped the product roadmap to include **intent-based YAML generation** by leading 11+ executive and IC user interviews with Azure service teams, translating qualitative pain into prioritized feature bets and a validated build plan.

Migrated internal documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool with rigorous metadata standards, cutting lookup time by **83%** and creating the retrieval foundation that downstream LLM workflows depended on.

Mobilized a 0→1 product strategy to eliminate region-launch toil, running discovery with **20+ service teams** to quantify **81 hours of manual effort per region** and shipping a roadmap that automated the critical path end-to-end.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** giving leadership real-time visibility into operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling targeted automation investment and data-driven prioritization of high-impact support areas.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies — sprint planning, standups, and retros — and ruthlessly prioritized the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilizing the developer intake process for the robotics platform team.

Drove alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by **25%** and unblocking faster iteration on warehouse robotics software.

Cut Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and lifted conversions **2.7%** by executing a digital-first GTM strategy, optimizing the website, Google Business profile, and paid funnel against measurable conversion KPIs.

Improved leadership pricing models by running **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying margin leaks and recommending pricing changes that directly improved per-job contribution margin.
